title: Owen Davis
html:
Member of Yahir's core OSU friend group ("the boys"). Known for repeated college hospital visits.

Key facts

  • Confirmed wedding-list invitee (2025 06 22 wedding list for now) — "Owen Davis."
  • Hospitalization stat is friend-group lore — captured in 2025 05 11 how many times has owen been to the hospital in college 3 1 as a Kahoot-style trivia question ("3, 1, 2, 4").
  • Member of the 2022 fantasy league roster (YG, Owen, Luke, Riley, Ayden, Ryan, Kai, MQ, Emilio).
  • Implicated in the Yahir's friend group blowup dream (Mar 2022) alongside Andrew and Kai.

Open questions

  • Currently living where? Likely still Oregon area.
  • Career path?

Wikilinks
